intentSynonyms: get a price guidance in priceline
look up a price guidance in priceline
fetch a single price guidance in priceline
view one specific price guidance in priceline
get hotel price trends for a city in priceline
description: Get hotel price trends for a city over a date range. Shows min, max, and average prices by star rating and product type for each date. Useful for finding the cheapest travel dates. Date format is YYYYMMDD.

start_date.description: Start of date range in YYYYMMDD format

end_date.description: End of date range in YYYYMMDD format

star_rating.description: Filter by star rating (default returns all star ratings)
